text:
Once upon an ancient time, in a land shrouded in mist, there lived a brave sorcerer named Aldric. Known far and wide for his mastery of spells that warmed hearts and cooled feuds, Aldric loved nothing more than chasing whispers of adventure across enchanted forests and deep caves.

One misty morning, he heard tales of glowing gemstones buried deep within the caverns of Snowdrift Peak. The gems, it was said, could grant anyone seven wishes. Intrigued, Aldric packed his potionskit.

He reached Snowdrift Peak and scaled its icy walls. Suddenly from nowhere appeared a furry little creature with amber eyes. It sniffed greedily at his boots. Aldric petted it gently.

"Who are you?" he asked.

"I'm Wintermoon," said the creature. "My folks say I carry starlight."

Aldric smiled. "Well, I suppose I do carry starlight too. See?"

He held out his lamp.

Wintermoon
